breaking.title: ‘Very dangerous’ Super Typhoon barrels towards US Pacific islands with 280 kmph winds
breaking.summary: Super Typhoon Bavi, a storm of Category 5 hurricane strength, is bearing down on Guam and the Northern Mariana Islands, triggering emergency evacuations. Destructive winds up to 280 km/h and torrential rain are already lashing the US Pacific territories. Authorities warn of catastrophic damage, with many structures potentially becoming uninhabitable for weeks. Residents are urged to seek shelter as the powerful typhoon approaches.

breaking.title: Iran's supreme leader absent as senior officials attend ayatollah's funeral
breaking.summary: Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen in public since the attack which killed his father at the onset of the US-Israel war with Iran.

breaking.title: Boy, 11, To Face Trial For Shopping Plaza Fire Which Killed 72 In Pakistan
breaking.summary: The inferno gutted the Gul Plaza shopping plaza on Karachi's famous M A Jinnah Road

breaking.title: Nigeria says two nationals killed in South Africa amid rise of anti-migrant attacks
breaking.summary: Nigeria's government said one of its nationals was reportedly killed by police officers "using gruesome interrogation techniques".

breaking.title: ‘People can be killed but ideals can't’: Iran condemns Trump's 'one shot' threat
breaking.summary: Iran has fiercely condemned US President Donald Trump's remarks about potentially eliminating its leadership, accusing America of lacking "civilisation, history, or honour." Trump's comments, made in an interview, questioned the sincerity of mourners at the funeral of former Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and suggested a swift strike could eliminate Iran's top officials. The funeral itself has drawn massive crowds, projected by Iran as a display of national unity and defiance.

breaking.title: Shooting in US on fourth of July: 8, including 4 children, injured in Brooklyn's Coney Island
breaking.summary: Tragedy struck Coney Island on Friday night as a shooting left at least eight people injured, including four young children. The incident occurred around 10:37 pm, with victims ranging from six to 37 years old. While most are in stable condition, a 21-year-old woman is critically injured. Police have recovered a firearm but no arrests have been made as investigations continue into the disturbing event.

breaking.title: Female elephant found dead in forest area near Watrap
breaking.summary: The death is due to natural causes, and the elephant did not have any external injuries, says official

breaking.title: Four more arrested in the murder of SC man
